name: Khabib Nurmagomedov
oneLiner: The cleanest prime run at lightweight: unbeaten in the UFC, overwhelming round control, and the strongest dominance case in this ranking.
compareShortCase: Khabib is the cleanest peak-dominance case: unbeaten, overwhelming, and almost never in real trouble once he reached elite lightweight level.
compareCounter: Khabib's argument against almost anyone is purity. No losses, no real collapse, no post-prime damage, and one of the clearest primes ever.
